welcome.title: AI 代理的信任层
welcome.subtitle: 验证自主代理背后的人员和公司。由 14+ 官方政府数据库集成和 x402 支付协议提供支持。

stats.title: 您的统计
stats.signInPrompt: 登录以查看您的验证统计和使用情况。

tutorial.title: 入门指南
tutorial.description: 刚接触 Smart Agent？快速浏览了解您可以做什么。
tutorial.stepOf: 第 {{ current }} 步，共 {{ total }} 步
tutorial.step0Desc: Smart Agent 为 AI 代理提供身份验证。通过 Avalanche 上的 x402 协议按验证付费。14+ 政府数据库集成，ERC-8004 代理标准。
tutorial.step0Tip: 您可以使用积分或 x402（加密货币）支付验证费用。
tutorial.step1Desc: 原生体验 x402 流程。代理识别付费端点，通过钱包签名请求授权，并在链上执行验证。完整的付费获取真相循环。
tutorial.step2Desc: 直接从浏览器测试我们的端点。探索每项功能，自定义参数，一键查看实时响应。
tutorial.step3Desc: 需要验证数百万用户？上传 CSV 或 Excel 文件。我们的代理并行处理记录，清理您的数据库并用经过验证的官方政府数据丰富它。
tutorial.step3Tip: 支持大文件和多列批量验证。
tutorial.step4Desc: Smart Scan 用于文档提取，状态检查用于 API 健康监控，事件用于服务警报，Smart Reduce 用于图像优化。
tutorial.step5Desc: 管理您的订阅并添加积分。按验证付费，无需固定订阅。

plans.active_users_explained: Use plans that are based on the number of users that will be constantly logging in and authenticating. This way you have a defined amount of users that can access in an unlimited way.
plans.advice: Please note that if you exceed the usage of your plan, $100 will be automatically recharged to your account so that you will always have credits.
plans.better_plan_text: We have a wide variety of plans, which adjust to the different needs you may have. Make sure you have the plan that best suits your needs.
plans.biometrics_explained: This is the number of users you can have with unlimited access through
plans.biometrics_explained3: If you exceed the number of active users in the month, you will be automatically charged for another 100 users so youwill never run out of access.
plans.biometrics_free: This plan does not have any type of access through biometrics, in case you need it, you will have to purchase it at an extra cost or change to a plan that includes it.
plans.biometrics_free2: If you use biometric accesses during the month, you will be automatically charged at the end of the billing period for each access consumed.
plans.biometrics_sessions4: If you exceed the number of biometric accesses in the month, you will be automatically charged at the end of the billing period for each additional access consumed.
plans.business_dash: The best plan for you to use our services on a large scale
plans.canceled_plan: Your plan will be canceled on
plans.define: The first thing you need to define is what type of plan you are going to use to link to your SmartAccess projects. Keep in mind that this defines the way in which your users can interact with the number of authentications that will be performed and the methods they can use to access.
plans.email_sessions4: If you exceed the number of biometric accesses in the month, you will be automatically charged at the end of the billing period for each additional access consumed.
plans.emails_explained: This is the number of users you can have with unlimited access through
plans.emails_explained3: If you exceed the number of active users in the month, you will be automatically charged for another 100 users so you will never run out of access.
plans.enterprise_dash: The best plan for you to use our services on a large scale
plans.explain_2: plans are based on the global amount of accesses that are going to be given to the users. This way you will have a defined amount of authentications and every time a user accesses, it is deducted from that global amount.
plans.explain_4: plans are based on the number of users that will be constantly logging in and authenticating. This way you have a defined amount of users that can access in an unlimited way.
plans.explanation_1: This plan includes unlimited biometrics logins per active users and up to 20,000 email logins. Logins generated through SMS & Whatsapp have an
plans.explanation_3: depending on the country in which they are used.
plans.explanation_free_1: This Free plan includes 200 email logins. Logins generated through Biometrics or SMS & Whatsapp have an
plans.explanation_session_1: This plan includes the corresponding purchase of Biometrics logins per session and up to

plans.extra_bio_title: What happens when I exceed my plan?
plans.extra_bio_explanation: When you exceed the biometrics, emails, or sessions included in your plan, additional charges will be applied automatically based on the extra costs listed below.

plans.per_sessions_explained: Use plans based on the global amount of accesses that are going to be given to the users. This way you will have a defined amount of authentications and every time a user accesses, it is deducted from that global amount.

plans.sms_email_info: The amount of SMS & Whatsapp you can send to authenticate varies from country to country. If you wish to use this functionality you will have to recharge a 10 credits package from which will be deducted each time an OTP is made by SMS or Whatsapp.
